prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年最低位次约5971→5887→6375→6848→7613，整体呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约1642名；2025年基准约7613名，较2024年后移765名，后移幅度明显加大；该校在北京市2021-2024年计划均为5人，2025年大幅扩招至20人；2026年计划增至32人，较2025年再扩招60%，扩招力度显著，对竞争有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 上海大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第60名，近年排名稳定在50-60区间，属于中上水平211院校；2026年声誉评价为明显负面，主要涉及学术不端事件（院长论文造假等），可能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第48，评价较热，短视频平台有一定曝光度；社会学获评A级、世界史获评A-级，为该校王牌学科；招生专业中的社会学类（人文社科类）对应社会学A级学科，具有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 北京市2026年高考考生总数约84900人，较2025年65434人增长约29.7%，考生规模大幅增加，竞争显著加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划大幅扩招（60%）以及北京市考生总数大幅增长（29.7%）三大因素：扩招对竞争有缓解作用（位次后移），但考生总数增长幅度更大（竞争加剧），且声誉负面事件可能抑制部分报考热度。在，考虑考生总数大幅增长带来的竞争加剧效应，适当前移位次；预测2026年最低位次约10204名，区间9704-10704名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 文科试验班类（不限选科）
- 电子信息类（物理、化学必选）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电气类（物理、化学必选，招生22人）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
暂无（该校在北京仅设2个专业组，招生专业较少，二档已覆盖全部招生专业）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 上海大学在北京本科批设不限选科（文科试验班类）和物理化学必选（电气类、电子信息类）两个专业组。预测位次约10204名，区间9704-10704名。位次在区间下限（9704名）以内可重点冲刺一档文科试验班类（社会学A级学科）；位次在区间中段可主攻二档电子信息类、电气类；位次接近区间上限（10704名）仍可稳妥报考电气类（招生人数最多，22人）。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking was approximately 5971 → 5887 → 6375 → 6848 → 7613, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1642 places in the last 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 7613, a backward shift of 765 places from 2024, with a significantly increased magnitude; the university's plan in Beijing from 2021 to 2024 was 5 students each year, but in 2025 it expanded significantly to 20 students; the 2026 plan increases to 32 students, a further 60% expansion compared to 2025, with a notable expansion intensity that alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 60th, with a stable ranking in the 50-60 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (dean paper fraud, etc.), which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin popularity ranks 48th, with a hot evaluation, indicating some exposure on short video platforms; Sociology is rated A-level, World History is rated A- level, as the university's flagship disciplines; the Sociology category (Humanities and Social Sciences) in the enrollment majors corresponds to the A-level Sociology discipline, which has some appeal.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam candidates in Beijing is about 84,900, an increase of about 29.7% from 65,434 in 2025, with a significant increase in candidate scale, leading to intensified competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the three major factors of the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, the significant expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (60%), and the substantial increase in the total number of candidates in Beijing (29.7%): expansion alleviates competition (backward shift in rankings), but the increase in candidate numbers is larger (intensified competition), and negative reputation events may suppress some application enthusiasm. Taking into account the intensified competition effect from the significant increase in candidate numbers, appropriately shift the ranking forward; predict the 2026 minimum ranking to be about 10,204, with a range of 9,704 to 10,704.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Liberal Arts Experimental Class (No subject restrictions)
- Electronic Information Class (Physics and Chemistry required).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Electrical Class (Physics and Chemistry required, enrolling 22 students).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
None (The university only sets up 2 major groups in Beijing, with few enrollment majors; Tier 2 already covers all enrollment majors).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Shanghai University sets up two major groups in the Beijing undergraduate batch: no subject restrictions (Liberal Arts Experimental Class) and Physics and Chemistry required (Electrical Class, Electronic Information Class). The predicted ranking is about 10,204, with a range of 9,704 to 10,704. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (9,704) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Liberal Arts Experimental Class (Sociology A-level discipline); those with rankings in the middle of the range can mainly target Tier 2 Electronic Information Class and Electrical Class; those with rankings near the upper limit of the range (10,704) can still safely apply for Electrical Class (with the largest enrollment, 22 students).
